content:
✔ Example: Should only a Warrior-type character be allowed to claim a legendary sword?

3. Should We Introduce “Artifact Resurrection” Mechanics?

✔ Example: If a legendary item expires, should there be a 1% chance it randomly reappears later?

🚀 Now ready to execute Version 7.5. Awaiting full macro schedule for reassessment.
🎮📖 Are you satisfied with this plan before moving forward?

📌 Version 7.6 – Finalizing Timers, Archetype-Restricted Items, and Artifact Resurrection Mechanics


🚀 This iteration finalizes expiration mechanics for buffs/debuffs, confirms archetype-based item restrictions, and introduces post-climax resurrection mechanics.

📜 1. Buffs & Debuffs Expiration – Timed in Cycles

📜 ALL buffs and debuffs now operate on a strict timed cycle.

✔ Buffs/Debuffs Expire After a Set Number of Actions or Classes
• One-Round Buffs: Last only for the next decision.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 444 (chunk 444/555)
